name: Taylor House Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the sweet potatoes until soft.
2. Peel and beat them until smooth, with no lumps.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (vanilla extract, salt, nutmeg, butter, and evaporated milk).
4. Beat everything together until creamy.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until the crust is brown.
7. Serves 6-8.
